GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Victoria Lee's guide to glowing skin", "The home-grown beauty reveals her daily routine.", "Model Victoria Lee currently calls New York City home, but still finds reasons to return to Australia regularly. Frequent travel means the David Jones ambassador has a streamlined beauty routine which is as effective as it is feel-good. She starts each day with a thick (the thicker the better, she says) smoothie, with almond milk, spinach, banana, berries, chia seeds and alkalising WelleCo Super Elixir Greens. As someone who wears a lot of make-up at work, Lee says the key to a successful skincare routine is gentle, effective cleansing. For mornings, she likes La Prairie Supreme Balm Cleanser, while for evenings, she opts for a double cleanse. First with a Shu Uemura Anti/Oxi +Cleansing Oil and then a rich lather with Liberty Belle RX Heartfelt Gentle Rose Cream Cleanser and a Foreo Luna 3 Plus. Lee follows cleansing with a roster of hard-working serums. "Damp skin means your serums absorb better into the skin, so if your face is dry, dampen it down again with water," she says. Her favourites are Dermalogica BioLumin-C eye serum and Sisley Phyto Blanc Le Concentre for day, and Guerlain Abeille Royale Double R serum at night. Since she has make-up applied by someone else at work, her own beauty bag is simplified. "The one thing I never miss is brushing up my brows. I have wild brows that need to be tamed," she laughs. Protection is also high on the agenda. Moisturiser with SPF, plus a layer of broad-spectrum sunscreen (she likes Ultraceuticals Ultra UV Protective Daily Moisturiser SPF30 Mattifying) and for blue light, Grown Alchemist Anti-Pollution Primer & Mist. The beauty product she'd take to a desert island? "A sheer lip balm. You can use it as a highlighter and sheen on the lids too," she says. To calm and centre herself, Lee favours journaling, meditation and a collection of crystals. "I carry them in a zip loc bag. They help me feel grounded and connected to what's important," she explains. Lee uses her routine as a quiet moment of meditation too. La Prairie White Caviar Creme Extraordinaire to moisturise in the AM, and Giorgio Armani Crema Nera Extrema Supreme Reviving Light Cream in the PM. Before she climbs into bed, Lee's routine ends with a lavender mist on linens, and a scoop of The Beauty Chef Inner Beauty Sleep Powder in a glass of water. "I make everything as cool and dark as possible. I'll use everything I can to get my body into sleep mode," she explains."
